author: FM Sardan
content: Bureau of Customs releases new CMO for solar panels. Duty 0% under ATIGA with Form D, 15% MFN otherwise. Requires DOE cert and ICC for inverters. Effective July 2026.
title: BOC CMO Update: Solar Panels HS Classification from China

author: TradExpress IMPACT
content: FDA clarifies lipstick, cream, shampoo, perfume need FDA Notification via e-portal, not LTO. Timeline 7-14 days. Requires GMC, Free Sale Certificate.
title: FDA Advisory: Cosmetics Need Notification Not Registration

content: Importing rice? Need BPI SPS Clearance, Phytosanitary from origin, NFA allocation. Landed: FOB+freight+35% duty+12% VAT+BPI fees.
title: BPI Requirements for Rice Importation 2026

content: Electronics with RF (routers, phones, Bluetooth) need NTC Type Acceptance Certificate before customs release. 15 days testing.
title: NTC Type Approval for Routers, Phones, Bluetooth

author: TradExpress Academy
title: How to Compute Landed Cost Philippines

content: Ceramic tiles from China need PS License or ICC per shipment. DTI BPS lab testing. Non-compliant subject to seizure.
title: DTI BPS: Ceramic Tiles Need PS Mark or ICC

content: Insight: China 28.4%, ASEAN 22%, US 9%, Japan 8%, Korea 7%. Electronics 32%. Solar, EV parts rising 18% YoY.
title: Market Intelligence: China Top Import Source 28.4%
